passage.title: Table Helper Chart
passage.text: Our group keeps a reading basket board near the cubbies. In the morning, Yuna reads it before story time. The reading basket board has name tags for table jobs and clean-up turns for the day's job. Mr. Kim asks us to choose one center and get ready. Sometimes we compare today's tag with yesterday's tag and notice one small change. We like the reading basket board because it helps us find the right books quickly.

questions.prompt: What is this passage mostly about?
questions.rationale: The whole passage explains how the reading basket board is used.

questions.prompt: Where is the reading basket board?
questions.rationale: The first sentence says the reading basket board is near the cubbies.

questions.prompt: When does Yuna use the reading basket board?
questions.rationale: The second sentence says Yuna uses it in the morning.

questions.prompt: What does the reading basket board have?
questions.rationale: The third sentence says the reading basket board has name tags.

questions.prompt: What does compare mean in the fifth sentence?
questions.rationale: Compare means to look at two things and think about them together.

questions.prompt: What does notice mean in the fifth sentence?
questions.rationale: Notice means to see and pay attention to something.
